nasb.text: Then the king of Egypt spoke to the Hebrew midwives, one of whom was named Shiphrah and the other was named Puah;

esv.text: Then the king of Egypt said to the Hebrew midwives, one of whom was named Shiphrah and the other Puah,

cnv.text: 埃及王吩咐兩個希伯來接生婦，一個名叫施弗拉，一個名叫普阿，

ccb.text: 埃及王又命令两个希伯来的接生婆施弗拉和普阿：
